title: Finish implementing Outlook Email and Calendar integrations
excerpt:

posts.author: TPCouriers (Carla)
posts.cookedHtml:
It feels like the Outlook integrations were done to the bare minimum just so you could say they exist. I’ve asked about this before, but nothing’s changed and they’re still barely useable.

Email has no formatting ability, and no ability to set things such as reply-to, cc, bcc.
You’ve implemented this code in Emails and Activities so why can’t we use it in our integration automations?

Calendar is even worse. Without the ability to choose which calendar on the account, it’s completely useless to anyone who has more than one. Last I checked, there’s no way to move an event to a different calendar using the API - It has to be chosen at creation. And then you only let us put in basic event details, not even the location.

Why bother implementing things if you aren’t interested in making them useable?
